## Summary

Briefly explain the problem and why this change is needed.

## Changes

- List the key changes at a glance.

## Screenshots / Video (UI changes)

Add before/after images or a short clip.

## How To Test

1. `bun install` (first run)
2. `bun run dev` to verify locally
3. `bun run lint && bun run format:check`
4. `bun run test` to run Playwright tests

## Linked Issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional title (e.g., `feat(ui): ...`, `fix(auth): ...`)
- [ ] Lint, format, and tests pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests when appropriate
- [ ] Updated docs (README/AGENTS.md) if needed
- [ ] No secrets committed; env via `.env.local`

## Notes

Breaking changes, migrations, or follow-ups.
